title: Dating app reply fatigue + conversation stall
pain_description: 100+ matches; replies die after 3-5 messages; meeting conversion 2-3%.
santifer_pattern: Profile + chat + LLM coach + nudge

title: Travel booking: itinerary across airlines + hotels + activities
pain_description: 8 tabs open; airline + hotel + activities + transit; re-search per change; hours lost.
santifer_pattern: Preference + LLM planner + booking + change handler

title: First-time home buyer: mortgage + inspection + closing confusion
pain_description: Pre-approval → offer → inspection → appraisal → closing — 90 days of terminology + docs; buyers anxious.
santifer_pattern: Buyer SSOT + timeline + LLM concierge + doc checker

title: Pet healthcare coordination: multiple vets + meds + records
pain_description: Primary vet + specialist + meds + insurance claims; records fragmented; owner is coordinator.
santifer_pattern: Records SSOT + vet portal + claim agent

title: Elder care: medical appointment coordination for aging parent
pain_description: Multiple specialists + pharmacy + caregiver + insurance — adult child juggling across time zones.
santifer_pattern: Family SSOT + multi-provider comms + alert agent

title: College application: essays + rec letters + financial aid
pain_description: 10-15 colleges × personalized essays + CSS profile + FAFSA + rec letters; deadline panic.
santifer_pattern: Profile + college fit + LLM essay drafter + tracker

title: Wedding planning: vendor + budget + guest logistics
pain_description: 200+ guests + 10 vendors + budget creep + RSVP chase — shared spreadsheet chaos.
santifer_pattern: Wedding SSOT + vendor comms + RSVP agent

title: Divorce asset + co-parent coordination
pain_description: Custody schedules + expense sharing + school comms + reimbursement — emotional + admin load.
santifer_pattern: Co-parent SSOT + expense split + LLM mediator

title: Chronic illness: symptom + medication tracking + care team comms
pain_description: Flare-ups tracked in journal; meds adjusted by multiple docs; notes not shared; patient advocates alone.
santifer_pattern: Symptom log + med reconcile + care-team shared record

title: Personal finance: account aggregation post-Mint
pain_description: Mint sunset; Monarch / Empower adequate but no AI advisor; net-worth tracking manual for many.
santifer_pattern: Plaid + LLM categorizer + advisor chat

title: Tax advisor search + engagement for complex individuals
pain_description: Crypto + equity + multi-state + foreign income; random CPAs fall short; searching for fit painful.
santifer_pattern: Profile + specialty match + intake + onboarding

title: Restaurant reservations + waitlist aggregation
pain_description: OpenTable + Resy + Tock + IG bookings; waitlist status across apps; mental overhead.
santifer_pattern: Multi-platform aggregator + preference agent

title: Vacation rental owner: multi-OTA ops
pain_description: Calendar sync + guest comms + cleaning + pricing + review follow-up — multiple apps.
santifer_pattern: Calendar + messaging + price + cleaner dispatch

title: Solo freelancer: finances + taxes + invoicing + subscriptions
pain_description: 1099 income + expenses + quarterly taxes + invoicing + business subscriptions — 40 hrs/yr admin.
santifer_pattern: Income + tax + invoice agent

title: Chronic pain / MSK: PT adherence + home exercise
pain_description: Home exercise program adherence 30-40%; reminders manual; PT reviews infrequent.
santifer_pattern: Program + reminder + CV form-check + PT dashboard

title: Consumer legal: simple estate documents
pain_description: LegalZoom-grade templates + state rules + e-signing + storage — most people skip, die intestate.
santifer_pattern: Intake + state rule + LLM doc + sign + storage

title: Medical bill negotiation for uninsured / underinsured
pain_description: ER bill arrives 5 months later; codes wrong 30%+; self-pay discounts buried; negotiation arcane.
santifer_pattern: Bill OCR + CPT check + negotiator agent

title: Teen mental health + crisis escalation for parents
pain_description: Teen behavior signals + school + clinician; parents blind to severity; crises missed.
santifer_pattern: Multi-signal + LLM risk + clinician+parent alerts

title: Cross-border family: remittance + tax + elder care
persona: Immigrant sending money + managing parents overseas
pain_description: Remittance + home-country tax + elder-care arrangement across oceans.
santifer_pattern: Remittance + home-country tax + care agent

title: Neurodivergent adult: executive function scaffolding
pain_description: Calendar + task + working-memory support needed; generic productivity apps overwhelming; coaching expensive.
santifer_pattern: ND-friendly intake + LLM body-double + task scaffold

title: Car purchase: used-car research + lemon check
pain_description: Buying used car: Carfax + market price + mechanic + financing + trade-in; fragmented, stressful.
santifer_pattern: VIN + market + inspection coord + financing advisor

title: Home renovation: contractor selection + change orders
pain_description: 3-5 bids + selection + contract + change orders + dispute — homeowners get burned.
santifer_pattern: Bid intake + LLM comparison + contract + change-order tracker

title: DIY legal: small claims + lease dispute letters
pain_description: Lease deposit + small claims + complaint letter — most can't afford lawyer, give up.
santifer_pattern: Situation + law RAG + LLM letter + filer

title: Health insurance selection at open enrollment
pain_description: 10+ plan options × family situation × deductible / premium / network — 30 min decision, wrong choice bleeds thousands.
santifer_pattern: Family profile + plan math + LLM recommender

title: Social security / Medicare enrollment decision
pain_description: Parts A/B/C/D + Medigap + claim-age; decisions irreversible; financial advisor pressure.
santifer_pattern: Profile + health + finances + LLM advisor

title: Parenting logistics: baby gear / milestones / pediatrician
pain_description: Gear research + milestone anxiety + pediatrician questions + sleep training — infinite blog posts, no clear path.
santifer_pattern: Baby profile + milestone + LLM advisor

title: Study abroad / visa for international students
pain_description: I-20 + F-1 + CGFNS + SEVIS + scholarship; agents charge $$$; confused students miss forms.
santifer_pattern: Country + program + LLM form agent + deadline tracker

title: Job search: application tracker + personalized resume
pain_description: Apply to 100+ jobs; tailor resume per role; track responses; ghosting widespread.
santifer_pattern: JD + profile + LLM tailor + apply + follow-up

title: Moving house: utility transfer + change-of-address
pain_description: Internet + power + water + mail + 20 subscription COAs — orchestrating across 10+ vendors.
santifer_pattern: Move date + vendor list + agent executes transfers

title: Fitness routine: gym + diet + sleep + recovery coordination
pain_description: Training + nutrition + sleep + HRV + PT — 6 apps; adjustments ad hoc.
santifer_pattern: Multi-signal + LLM coach + adjust agent

title: Digital estate planning: password + crypto handoff
pain_description: 1Password + crypto wallets + social accounts — if you die, family locked out; process opaque.
santifer_pattern: Asset inventory + beneficiary flow + triggered handoff

title: Pet adoption: shelter matching + post-adoption support
pain_description: Shelters + rescues fragmented; matching by rough filter; post-adoption training sparse.
santifer_pattern: Adopter profile + shelter feed + match + post-ad support

title: Hearing aid / audiology: fitting + follow-up
pain_description: $3-6K per pair; fit adjustments require audiologist visits; bi-weekly follow-up; no home support.
santifer_pattern: Remote tuning + LLM troubleshoot + audiologist loop

title: Language learning: motivation + consistency
pain_description: Duolingo streaks without fluency; speaking + writing feedback scarce; motivation fades.
santifer_pattern: Level test + LLM conversation partner + feedback

title: Independent therapist: insurance credentialing maintenance
pain_description: Credentialing with 5-10 payers; revalidation every 3 years; claim denials for credentialing lapses.
santifer_pattern: Payer DB + revalidation tracker + filer

title: Prosumer photographer: print lab + delivery + rights
pain_description: Selling prints: print lab + shipping + rights + client comms — tool gap at hobbyist-to-pro level.
santifer_pattern: Gallery + print lab + rights agent

title: Food allergy kid: restaurant + school + travel
pain_description: Every menu, school lunch, playdate = risk; ingredient check manual; anxiety.
santifer_pattern: Allergen profile + menu scanner + alert

title: Mental fitness: journaling + habit + reflection
pain_description: Journaling apps collect entries; no insight; habit correlations unseen.
santifer_pattern: Journal + habit data + LLM patterns + prompt

title: Chronic medication: refill + insurance prior auth
pain_description: Pharmacy + insurance + PA + delivery — cycle breaks 1-2x/yr; patients out of meds.
santifer_pattern: Rx calendar + pharmacy + PA agent + delivery

title: Infertility journey: appointment + medication + emotional tracking
pain_description: Cycle monitoring + appointments + medications + grief; generic apps miss emotional weight.
santifer_pattern: Cycle + med + emotional check-in + clinic sync

title: Special education (IEP/504) advocacy
pain_description: IEP meetings + school pushback + state rights + documentation; parents learn on fly; advocates expensive.
santifer_pattern: Child profile + IDEA RAG + LLM advocate drafter

title: Service-member transition to civilian career
pain_description: MOS → civilian skill translation + credentialing + VA benefits — high-friction transition.
santifer_pattern: Service record + skill mapper + LLM resume + VA benefits agent

title: Refugee / asylum-seeker services navigation
pain_description: Housing + work auth + language + school + health — dozens of agencies; language barrier.
santifer_pattern: Case profile + multilingual agent + agency router

title: Foster / adoptive family case navigation
pain_description: Social workers + court + education + therapy for foster kids; coordination intense; burnout.
santifer_pattern: Kid profile + stakeholder SSOT + LLM coordinator

title: Recovery (addiction) support: peer + sponsor + appointments
pain_description: Relapse prevention requires daily cadence — sponsor + meetings + therapy + med — all voluntary.
santifer_pattern: Daily check-in + sponsor + appointments + alert

title: Prosumer podcaster monetization: ad stack + sponsor deals
pain_description: Ad networks + direct sponsors + dynamic insertion + payout reconciliation — multiple tools.
santifer_pattern: Inventory + sponsor CRM + insertion + reconcile

title: Small farm CSA: subscribers + harvest + deliveries
pain_description: CSA subscribers + weekly share + delivery routes + allergies; spreadsheet-driven.
santifer_pattern: Subs + harvest + route + customer comms

title: Independent musician: distribution + royalty tracking
pain_description: Distro + publishing + PRO + royalty statements from Spotify/Apple/SoundExchange — money leaks.
santifer_pattern: Multi-source statements + LLM recon + royalty chase

title: HOA owner: assessment disputes + document access
pain_description: HOA fees + fines + rule disputes + CC&R lookup; owner-board asymmetry.
santifer_pattern: CC&R RAG + LLM advocate + dispute letter

title: Personal brand creator: LinkedIn + Twitter + newsletter consistency
pain_description: LinkedIn + Twitter + newsletter + podcast — consistency needed; creators burn out.
santifer_pattern: Brand voice + LLM cross-channel scheduler
